$comment: Freally Central product catalog — the SOURCE OF TRUTH for the hub grid. Hosted on GitHub Pages (https://mikesruthless12.github.io/freally-central/freally-central.json) so the grid updates without shipping a new Central build. Central resolves LIVE data (latest version + date, per-OS download_count, installer URLs) from the GitHub Releases API against each app's `assets` patterns; this file holds only what the API cannot give (marketing copy, icon, start date, OS->asset rules, release status). `status`: 'available' (has releases / downloadable) or 'coming-soon' (listed as an upcoming release, not yet downloadable). `icon` points at Central's own Pages copy of each app's icon so the grid always resolves the big card image.

apps.name: Freally Capture
apps.tagline: Record and stream like a studio — one clean app.
apps.description: A local-first, cross-platform live-streaming & recording studio (OBS-class): a real-time GPU scene compositor, multi-track recording, and multistream to every platform at once — entirely on your machine. No accounts, no telemetry, no cloud.
features: Owned wgpu GPU scene compositor with per-source filters & transitions
Multi-track recording (hardware encoders + the owned lossless codec)
Virtual camera, replay buffer, downstream keyers, 3D transforms

apps.name: Freally Vault
apps.tagline: Your passwords, passkeys & secrets — encrypted, local-first, yours.
apps.description: A local-first, zero-knowledge, end-to-end-encrypted password, passkey & secrets manager. KeePass-compatible, memory-safe Rust core, completely free — your vault never leaves your machine.

apps.name: Freally Player
apps.tagline: Plays anything. Beautifully. No ads, no spyware.
apps.description: A local-first, cross-platform media player that plays virtually anything with hardware acceleration — a modern UI, a real media library, and streaming, with no ads and no telemetry.

apps.name: Freally AV
apps.description: Freally's local-first anti-virus for Windows, macOS, and Linux. On the way — not yet available to download.

apps.$comment: Freally Studio is listed as an upcoming release but is otherwise excluded from the brand-wide download counter/rollout until its own roadmap exists (roadmap FC-51). It is a pre-release; no stable downloads yet.
apps.name: Freally Studio
apps.tagline: An AI-assisted music studio — coming soon.
apps.description: A full-featured DAW with AI pattern generation across 35+ genres, an FL-style mixer, arrangement timeline, and audio-clip editor. Pre-release — not yet available to download.

apps.name: Freally Sourcerer
apps.description: This Freally-brand app is on the way. Not yet available to download.

apps.name: Freally File Manager
apps.tagline: A cross-platform file manager — coming soon.
apps.description: This Freally-brand app is on the way. Not yet available to download.
